descricao: Allows players to set a custom frame rate limit (FPS cap), which helps in stabilizing performance on high-refresh monitors or reducing power consumption and heat on laptops. Mobile: Incompatible; the mobile version uses the system's native V-Sync/refresh rate and does not allow for external FPS overrides. Warnings: Setting the lock too low may cause input lag, while setting it too high on weak hardware can cause inconsistent stuttering.
